xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: Sector 6, Dronagiri, Taluka Uran, District Raigad, Navi Mumbai, Raigarh, Maharashtra-400 707
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: 4th Floor, Prius Platinum, Saket District Centre, Saket, New Delhi -110017
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfMainActivity: Transportation (including Freight Transport), Storage and Warehousing
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: Gateway Distriparks Limited (GDL / the Company) is an integrated inter-modal logistics service provider. It has a network of Inland Container Depots and Container Freight Stations strategically located across the country, operating a fleet of 34 trainsets along with 500+ trailers for transportation between its facilities and maritime ports, as well as first & last mile connectivity to provide end-to-end solutions to the EXIM industry. The company offers general & bonded warehousing, rail & road transportation, container handling services and other value-added services
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProductOrServiceSoldByTheEntit: Container Storage, Handling and Ground Rent
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: GDL offers integrated logistics services by leveraging its relationships with customers, employees, business partners and other key stakeholders. The company serves customers across various industries including Automobiles & Ancillaries, Steel, Agro, Chemical, E-commerce, Engineering, Retail industry, Pharmaceuticals, Healthcare, FMCG, etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheHoldingOrSubsidiaryAs: Kashipur Infrastructure and Freight Terminal Private Limited
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MaterialIssueIdentified: Climate change, environment and GHG emissions
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Transportation, Cargo Handling and Storage being the main activities, we are conscious of our contributions to climate change in the form of GHG emissions
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: We are adopting several initiatives to minimize our carbon footprint, such as achieving energy efficiency in electrical consumption, switching to solar energy, shifting vehicles from diesel to CNG, etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Customer retention is among the top priorities of the business and essential for our continued growth
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Continuous formal and informal interactions with customers through mails and calls in order to achieve high customer satisfaction
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Well-trained employees contribute positively to the operational performance of the organization
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Training needs are identified at the start of the year, and it is ensured that relevant trainings are imparted to the employees
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Strong corporate governance helps achieve the organization’s purpose and mission and mitigates risks that undermine stakeholder trust, reputation and disrupt business
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Developing and implementing a robust and holistic Corporate Governance framework
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Health & safety is among the top priorities, as any accident has a major impact in terms of cost, life, and reputation, among others
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: CFS Mumbai and Chennai are ISO 45001 certified, and regular trainings are imparted to employees across locations
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheNationalAndInternatio: ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, CTPAT, GSV, AEO*
ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, CTPAT, GSV, AEO*

ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, CTPAT, GSV, AEO*
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:SpecificCommitmentsGoalsAndTar: No such specific goals, commitment and targets has been set by the company with respect to all the principles and core elements of NGRBC that is to be adhered in a specific timeline.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: At Gateway Distriparks Limited, Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) principles are fundamental to our strategic vision. These values are deeply embedded in our corporate culture, reinforced through comprehensive policies and standards that drive sustainable growth and long-term stakeholder value. Our green initiatives include the deployment of waste composting machines within our facilities, transitioning our fleet to CNG to reduce emissions, and actively exploring electric vehicle options such as Electric Reach Stackers and other EVs to further decrease our carbon footprint. We have also initiated the installation of solar power systems at our sites to harness renewable energy. A significant part of our sustainability efforts is the "Go Green" initiative, aimed at minimizing paper consumption. We have implemented an e-forwarding module that digitizes our documentation processes, reducing the reliance on paper and supporting our goal of creating a paperless environment. This transition not only conserves natural resources but also enhances operational efficiency and data security. We are committed to continually evaluating innovative technologies and operational practices to further reduce our environmental impact. By investing in these ESG initiatives, we aim to uphold responsible service delivery, address climate change proactively, and promote ethical governance. Our comprehensive approach ensures that sustainability remains at the forefront of our growth trajectory, benefitting both our organization and the broader community.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: Name: Mr. Divyang Jain Designation: Company Secretary
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheAgencyIfTheEntityCarr: External assessments include ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certifications conducted by IQNET Ltd; CTPAT certification by URS Verification Pvt Ltd; and GSV certification for CFS Mumbai by Intertek – and include an assessment of the policies and procedures maintained by GDL. Indian customs have conducted and inspected the sites of GDL in relation to renewal of their AEO certificates.

External assessments include ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certifications conducted by IQNET Ltd; CTPAT certification by URS Verification Pvt Ltd; and GSV certification for CFS Mumbai by Intertek – and include an assessment of the policies and procedures maintained by GDL. Indian customs have conducted and inspected the sites of GDL in relation to renewal of their AEO certificates.

External assessments include ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certifications conducted by IQNET Ltd; CTPAT certification by URS Verification Pvt Ltd; and GSV certification for CFS Mumbai by Intertek – and include an assessment of the policies and procedures maintained by GDL. Indian customs have conducted and inspected the sites of GDL in relation to renewal of their AEO certificates.

External assessments include ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certifications conducted by IQNET Ltd; CTPAT certification by URS Verification Pvt Ltd; and GSV certification for CFS Mumbai by Intertek – and include an assessment of the policies and procedures maintained by GDL. Indian customs have conducted and inspected the sites of GDL in relation to renewal of their AEO certificates.

External assessments include ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certifications conducted by IQNET Ltd; CTPAT certification by URS Verification Pvt Ltd; and GSV certification for CFS Mumbai by Intertek – and include an assessment of the policies and procedures maintained by GDL. Indian customs have conducted and inspected the sites of GDL in relation to renewal of their AEO certificates.

External assessments include ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certifications conducted by IQNET Ltd; CTPAT certification by URS Verification Pvt Ltd; and GSV certification for CFS Mumbai by Intertek – and include an assessment of the policies and procedures maintained by GDL. Indian customs have conducted and inspected the sites of GDL in relation to renewal of their AEO certificates.

External assessments include ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certifications conducted by IQNET Ltd; CTPAT certification by URS Verification Pvt Ltd; and GSV certification for CFS Mumbai by Intertek – and include an assessment of the policies and procedures maintained by GDL. Indian customs have conducted and inspected the sites of GDL in relation to renewal of their AEO certificates.

External assessments include ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certifications conducted by IQNET Ltd; CTPAT certification by URS Verification Pvt Ltd; and GSV certification for CFS Mumbai by Intertek – and include an assessment of the policies and procedures maintained by GDL. Indian customs have conducted and inspected the sites of GDL in relation to renewal of their AEO certificates.

External assessments include ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certifications conducted by IQNET Ltd; CTPAT certification by URS Verification Pvt Ltd; and GSV certification for CFS Mumbai by Intertek – and include an assessment of the policies and procedures maintained by GDL. Indian customs have conducted and inspected the sites of GDL in relation to renewal of their AEO certificates.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: Industry Process Overview, System & Process Updates, SEBI LODR Amendments
Industry Process Overview, System & Process Updates, SEBI LODR Amendments
Safety & Security Training, Basic Life Support Training, Data Analytics tools - Advanced Excel and Power BI, Safety, POSH, Vendor Management
POSH, Cyber Security, First Aid, Safety, Hazardous Cargo, Basic life support training, Grooming and basic etiquettes, Code of Conduct, Health Awareness program, Traffic Law
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: The Code of Ethics for Principal Executive and Senior Officers helps maintain the standards of business conduct for GDL and ensures compliance with legal requirements. The purpose of the Code is to deter wrongdoing and promote ethical conduct
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImprovementsInEnviron: GDL has undertaken several initiatives to improve environmental and social impacts like steps towards energy efficiency across different facilities by converting diesel trailers to CNG based trailers, introduction of electric reach stacker, and implementation of Gateway Connect IOS system and ITV Move tracking.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: Since we are a service-based industry, this is not applicable.
Since we are a service-based industry, this is not applicable.
Since we are a service-based industry, this is not applicable.
Since we are a service-based industry, this is not applicable.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: there is a Grievances Redressal Committee for addressing the grievances of the employees/workers. This committee examines the grievances expressed by the employees/workers and addresses the same in consultation with the management within the stipulated frame

there is a Grievances Redressal Committee for addressing the grievances of the employees/workers. This committee examines the grievances expressed by the employees/workers and addresses the same in consultation with the management within the stipulated frame

there is a Grievances Redressal Committee for addressing the grievances of the employees/workers. This committee examines the grievances expressed by the employees/workers and addresses the same in consultation with the management within the stipulated frame

there is a Grievances Redressal Committee for addressing the grievances of the employees/workers. This committee examines the grievances expressed by the employees/workers and addresses the same in consultation with the management within the stipulated frame
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: the company has a fire and safety training system implemented, which is mandatory for all employees & workers. Further, GDL also provides on-the-job training to all its employees and workers entailing training on all work-related hazards and safeguards in line with their respective job requirements. In addition, CFS Mumbai and Chennai location are certified as per ISO 45001 & comply with the health and safety requirements of the certification for a specific time frame.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: GDL units / locations have safety managers who ensure that any work-related hazards are identified and addressed on a timely basis.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: GDL has conducted Health and Safety trainings whereby the employees are trained on different aspects viz. fire drill, handling hazardous equipment / machinery, etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: No significant risk was observed during assessments. Therefore, this is Not Applicable.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: Yes, GDL has identified and is responsible for the needs of all its stakeholders, especially those who are disadvantaged, vulnerable and marginalized
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: To meet the expectations of customers so that they are satisfied with the service outcome
To communicate business performance via press release, statutory & voluntary disclosures, personal meetings, presentations, quarterly & annual results, dividend, etc.
Learning and Development, Training Curriculum and Education, Townhall, One to one, workshops, surveys, Group Discussion, cross functional team meetings
To comply with required regulations at each location, to participate in policy advocacy for the benefit of the industry through trade bodies
To implement CSR and welfare initiatives across key areas based on need assessment, and employee volunteering, among others
To perform services & supply of material to GDL based on the agreed contract & commercial. Supplier evaluation is done regularly to know concerns on the services provided
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: Yes, we have POSH committee and grievance committee in place which address all the issues related Human Rights.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: GDL has committee for Sexual Harassment; Discrimination at workplace; Child Labour; Forced Labour/ Involuntary Labour; Wages; Other human rights related issues which addresses any complaints pertaining to above cited any of act strictly and in a timely manner. GDL always ensure that such reported instances are well taken and handled properly. Additionally, the policy ensures that no adverse consequences are faced by the complainant.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: No significant risks/ concerns were raised during assessments.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfCoverageAndImplementa: Company has already implemented Zero liquid discharge at Sahnewal location, where treated water is used for our own horticulture purposes. Company will further evaluate the possibility of implementing ZLD in other locations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProjectRelatedToReduc: GDL is currently implementing measures to transition diesel trailers to compressed natural gas (CNG) to mitigate greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions. As part of this initiative, last year 8 trailers have already been converted to CNG, with an additional 53 trailers converted this year. In addition, we have integrated battery-operated forklifts & electric reach stackers into our facilities for more sustainable operations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: GDL is in process of preparing its Waste Management Policy.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ReasonsAndCorrectiveActionTake: Not applicable as none of the facility is situated in ecologically sensitive areas.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOrDetailsOfTheLawOrRegulat: Currently only CFS Mumbai, CFS Chennai, ICD Sahnewal and CFS Vizag have valid Consent to Operate (CTO) from State Pollution Control Board. The company is in the process of filing CTO application for rest of its locations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideDetailsOfTheNonComplian: Currently only CFS Mumbai, CFS Chennai, ICD Sahnewal and CFS Vizag have valid Consent to Operate (CTO) from State Pollution Control Board. The company is in the process of filing CTO application for rest of its locations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AnyFinesOrPenaltiesOrActionTak: Currently only CFS Mumbai, CFS Chennai, ICD Sahnewal and CFS Vizag have valid Consent to Operate (CTO) from State Pollution Control Board. The company is in the process of filing CTO application for rest of its locations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:CorrectiveActionTakenForNonCom: Currently only CFS Mumbai, CFS Chennai, ICD Sahnewal and CFS Vizag have valid Consent to Operate (CTO) from State Pollution Control Board. The company is in the process of filing CTO application for rest of its locations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheTradeAndIndustryChamb: Container Freight Stations Association of India (CFSAI)
National Association of Container Freight Stations (NACFS)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: Although company doesn’t have any formal mechanism for receiving and redressing grievances from the community, but all the terminal heads are addressing the complaints received from the community through E mails and complaint is forwarded by terminal heads to respective department for resolution.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: In GDL Customers share their queries/grievances to customer service team through email/phone/verbal at ICDs. Customer service team then checks it and sends it to the internal departments for resolution, after that customer service team does follow up. Post receiving the solution internally customer service team reverts to the customer with closure remarks. There is a centralized email id on which customers can main their queries - mail@gatewaydistriparks.com.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: There were no security occurrences / re- occurrences relating to advertising, delivery of essential services, cyber security and data privacy of customers which led to penalty / action taken by regulatory authorities on safety of products / services.
